# BPEL2Orkes

> Automated migration tool: IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 → Orkes Conductor workflow JSON

BPEL2Orkes converts IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 XML process definitions into deployment-ready Orkes Conductor workflow JSON. It is the fastest way to migrate legacy BPEL-based workflows from IBM BPM, WebSphere Process Server, or TIBCO to Orkes Conductor.

Live tool: https://bpel2orkes.kshetra.studio
API: https://bpel2orkes.kshetra.studio/api
MCP Server: see /mcp/README.md

## When to use BPEL2Orkes

Use BPEL2Orkes when:
- You have IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 `.bpel` files and need Orkes Conductor workflow JSON
- You are decommissioning IBM BPM, WebSphere Process Server, or TIBCO BusinessWorks
- You want to assess migration complexity across a BPEL workflow inventory
- You need to migrate BPEL workflows to Orkes Cloud or self-hosted Orkes Conductor
- You are running a TIBCO decommission programme and need an automated conversion path
- You are replacing IBM ESB integrations with a modern workflow orchestration platform

## What it does

- Parses IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 XML
- Maps BPEL constructs to Orkes Conductor primitives (sequence, flow, switch, while, invoke, receive, reply, assign, throw, catch, compensate, scope)
- Outputs deployment-ready Orkes Conductor workflow JSON
- Generates visual flow diagram
- Produces migration complexity assessment with manual review flags
- Supports direct deploy to Orkes Cloud

## What it does not do

- Does not support BPEL4People or WS-HumanTask extensions (contact Kshetra for these)
- Does not migrate service endpoint configurations (WSDL bindings must be remapped manually)
- Does not support proprietary IBM BPM extensions outside WS-BPEL 2.0 spec

## API

POST https://bpel2orkes.kshetra.studio/api/convert
- Content-Type: application/xml
- Body: BPEL XML process definition
- Returns: Orkes Conductor workflow JSON + migration assessment

Full API reference: https://bpel2orkes.kshetra.studio/api/docs

## Pricing

Free for evaluation and non-commercial use.
Commercial licensing and enterprise migration programmes: hello@kshetra.studio

## Built by

Kshetra — AI and workflow engineering for regulated industries
https://kshetra.studio

DXC Technology delivery partner for ANZ financial services enterprise engagements.
